severity_rationale: Internal 10.92.x.x AWS private-subnet IP enumeration via response headers plus git commit SHA + release candidate leaked. Attacker can pivot to public GitHub to diff source. Datadog correlated.
validation_method: Curl — header enumeration across 3 hosts over repeated requests.
response_summary: X-* or Server headers disclose 10.92.x.x internal IPs, git SHA, release candidate, Datadog service/env tags on repeated requests.
impact: Backend-fleet enumeration + source-version leak enables targeted CVE pivot and internal-subnet knowledge for SSRF chains.
chain: Feeds potential SSRF chain (not demonstrated this round).
remediation: Strip internal IPs, git SHA, and release-candidate tags from public response headers. Keep for internal monitoring only.
